sentences.english: Some people buy noodles dried in a packet, others make them fresh from wheat or rice.
sentences.korean: 어떤 사람은 건면을 사고 어떤 사람은 밀이나 쌀로 생면을 만들어요.

sentences.english: From their origins, probably somewhere in China, noodle recipes were spread by traders on the ancient Silk Road.
sentences.korean: 아마 중국 어딘가에서 시작된 국수 레시피가 고대 실크로드 상인들에 의해 퍼졌어요.

sentences.english: At each destination along the road, people gave noodles a twist, adding different flavours and ingredients to create a new dish.
sentences.korean: 길을 따라 각 목적지에서 사람들은 다른 맛과 재료를 더해 국수에 변형을 가해 새로운 요리를 만들었어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Did a Civilisation Exist Before Humans?
Why Are Some Animals Black and White?
